  "findings": [
    "Thermal growth offset was ignored during shaft alignment on a hot service asset",
    "Operating misalignment due to thermal expansion causing high vibration and stress on bearings/couplings"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the machinery to prevent catastrophic bearing or coupling failure",
    "Perform hot alignment verification or calculate thermal growth offsets per API 686",
    "Re-align the machine cold with the correct target offsets applied"
  ],
  "rationale": "Aligning hot-service machinery without accounting for thermal growth offsets violates API 686 standards. While the machine may measure as aligned when cold, it will grow out of alignment at operating temperature, leading to severe vibration, premature bearing wear, and potential coupling failure.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 4 (Machinery Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Manuals (Thermal Growth Compensation)"
  ]
}
